description: arXiv:2605.12111v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study a sequential resource allocation problem motivated by adaptive network recruitment, in which a limited budget of identical resources must be allocated over multiple rounds to individuals with stochastic referral capacity. Successful referrals endogenously generate future decision opportunities while allocating additional resources to...
author: Yuqi Pan, Davin Choo, Haichuan Wang, Milind Tambe, Alastair van Heerden, Cheryl Johnson
